arts.ttl: Arsenal identify Benjamin Sesko transfer alternative amid £60m offer and Victor Osimhen promise - Matthew Abbott - football.london
arts.sum: football.london says: If there is a break clause in Osimhen's loan deal at Galatasaray, then Arsenal should explore convincing the player and Napoli to do business. Turkish journalist Kagan Dursun, via Haber Sari Kirmiz i, claims Manchester United have verbally offered Napoli around £60million, but could not convince the striker after coming to Istanbul despite an exit clause in his loan deal this month.

arts.ttl: Why Spurs will stand by their man… for now: Club are scouring the market to help Ange Postecoglou end rotten run but here's how Arsenal could scupper their plans
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: Their first-half capitulation goes straight into the club's hall of shame alongside the ignominy of falling 5-0 behind after 21 minutes at Newcastle in April 2023.

arts.ttl: “Arsenal are currently in contact” – Ben Jacobs shares exciting update on 65-goal, 42-assists striker
arts.sum: Arsenal have been linked with a move for Premier League striker Matheus Cunha this transfer window as Mikel Arteta looks to reinforce his attack during the January transfer window. The Gunners are in the midst of an injury crisis, with two of their key forwards sidelined with long-term injuries. Superstar Bukayo Saka is sidelined until March […] The post “Arsenal are currently in contact” – Ben Jacobs shares exciting update on 65-goal, 42-assists striker appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher slams £200m Arsenal transfer decision amid damning Edu and Mikel Arteta verdict
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher believes Arsenal should face scrutiny for their decision to sign Mikel Merino instead of a forward during the summer transfer window when they already had Declan Rice and Kai Havertz capable of playing in the same position. Injuries to Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Jesus have left the team short of options in forward areas, and Carragher agrees that needs addressing this month.

arts.ttl: Emmanuel Petit reveals why he still believes Arsenal can overhaul Liverpool in the title race as he locks horns with Jamie Carragher
arts.sum: The Reds' 2-0 victory at Brentford on Saturday, secured after Darwin Nunez's stoppage-time double, saw them extend their gap over Mikel Arteta's side.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Gyokeres TRUTH, Sesko SAGA, Isak THREAT, Chelsea INTEREST
arts.sum: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Gyokeres TRUTH, Sesko SAGA, Isak THREAT, Chelsea INTEREST The season-ending injury to Gabriel Jesus has convinced Mikel Arteta that he needs to take action and Arsenal have been busy enquiring about potential options over the past week or so.

arts.ttl: Arsenal given Viktor Gyokeres transfer approval as Mikel Arteta sent Alexander Isak message
arts.sum: Ex-Arsenal winger Jermaine Pennant believes that the Gunners should be prioritising a move for Sporting Lisbon's Viktor Gyokeres over Newcastle United's Alexander Isak.
